zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Crawford於1165年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，他的父親Sir John de Crawford20歲，母親Margaret de Huntington -20歲。他於1190年之前與Margaret Loudoun在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1246年被列為1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii)。他去世於1250年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度享年85歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Crawford于1165年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，他的父亲Sir John de Crawford20岁，母亲Margaret de Huntington -20岁。他于1190年之前与Margaret Loudoun在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1246年被列为1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii)。他去世于1250年在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度享年85岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Crawford was born in 1165, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John de Crawford, was 20 and his mother, Margaret de Huntington -, was 20. He married Margaret Loudoun before 1190, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1246, at the age of 81, his occupation is listed as 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii). He died in 1250, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 85, and was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Crawford est né en 1165, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Crawford, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Huntington -, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Loudoun avant 1190, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1246, à l’âge de 81 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii). Il est décédé en 1250, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Crawford 1165 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Crawford 20 und seine Mutter Margaret de Huntington - 20. Er hat vor 1190 in Ayrshire, Scotland Margaret Loudoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1246, als er 81 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii) aufgeführt. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Crawford è nato il nel 1165 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John de Crawford, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Huntington -, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Loudoun prima del 1190, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1246, all'età di 81 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii). Morì nel 1250, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Crawfordが1165年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John de Crawfordは20歳，母Margaret de Huntington -は20歳であった。1190年以前にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでMargaret Loudounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1246年，81歳の時，職業は1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii)と記録されている。彼は1250年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで85歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Crawford(이)가 1165년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Crawford(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Huntington -(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1190년 이전 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Margaret Loudoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1246년, 81세의 나이로 그의 직업은 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii)이었다. 그는 1250년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland: Mordington, Berrick, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Crawford nasceu em 1165, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Crawford, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Huntington -, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Loudoun antes 1190, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1246, com 81 anos, sua profissão aparece como 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii). Ele faleceu em 1250, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Crawford родился в 1165 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Crawford было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Huntington -, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Loudoun перед 1190 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1246 году, в возрасте 81 год,  он работал по профессии 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii). Он умер в 1250 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald de Crawford nació en 1165, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Crawford, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret de Huntington -, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Loudoun antes de 1190, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1246, a la edad de 81 años, su ocupación registrada era 1st sheriff of ayr (during reign of king alexander ii). Murió en 1250, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
